title: platostoma coloratum var. minutum
intro: Platostoma coloratum var. minutum, also known as Dwarf Blue Plectranthus, is a small, perennial plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the management of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and pain reliever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish, or dried and used in herbal remedies.
